name: app.R
content:
library(shiny)

# -------------------------------
# CONSENSUS MODEL COEFFICIENTS
# -------------------------------
beta <- c(
    "(Intercept)" = -2.343983,
    ALCOHOL_9357063 = 0.195517,
    CLOSE_TO_OTHERS_9357021 = 0.010000,
    CLOSE_TO_OTHERS_9359021 = -0.003859,
    CLOSE_TO_OTHERS_9360021 = 0.047410,
    COPING_9360090 = 0.030327,
    DAILY_EMOTIONAL_MENTAL_SCALE_1_9357004 = -0.004351,
    DAILY_EMOTIONAL_MENTAL_SCALE_1_9359004 = -0.001159,
    DAILY_EMOTIONAL_MENTAL_SCALE_1_9360004 = 0.032253,
    DAILY_EMOTIONAL_STATE_2_9357007 = 0.000157,
    DAILY_EMOTIONAL_STATE_2_9359007 = -0.155050,
    DAILY_EMOTIONAL_STATE_2_9360007 = -0.009537,
    DAILY_EMOTIONAL_STATE_3_9357010 = -0.003624,
    DAILY_EMOTIONAL_STATE_3_9359010 = -0.020283,
    DAILY_EMOTIONAL_STATE_3_9360010 = 0.000568,
    DAILY_EMOTIONAL_STATE_4_9357013 = -0.003514,
    DAILY_EMOTIONAL_STATE_4_9359013 = 0.002125,
    DAILY_EMOTIONAL_STATE_4_9360013 = 0.018485,
    DAILY_EMOTIONAL_STATE_5_9357016 = -0.049124,
    DAILY_EMOTIONAL_STATE_5_9359016 = -0.165650,
    DAILY_EMOTIONAL_STATE_5_9360016 = -0.011680,
    DAILY_EMOTIONAL_STATE_6_9357019 = -0.003998,
    DAILY_EMOTIONAL_STATE_6_9359019 = 0.014834,
    DAILY_EMOTIONAL_STATE_6_9360019 = 0.027728,
    DAILY_NEGATIVE_STRESSFUL_EVENT_9357029 = 0.171520,
    DAILY_NEGATIVE_STRESSFUL_EVENT_9359029 = -0.007553,
    DAILY_NEGATIVE_STRESSFUL_EVENT_9360029 = 0.151680,
    FREQUENCY_OF_DEATH_THOUGHTS_1_9360050 = 0.007422,
    FREQUENCY_OF_DEATH_THOUGHTS_2_9360057 = 0.137821,
    FREQUENCY_OF_DEATH_THOUGHTS_3_9360063 = 0.045179,
    NEGATIVE_RELATIONSHIP_EVENTS_9360081 = 0.500361,
    NON_SUICIDAL_SELF_INJURY_9357062 = 0.106398,
    SELF_EFFICACY_9360070 = -0.061836,
    SLEEP1_9357065 = -0.013660,
    SLEEP_9357058 = 0.036657,
    SLEEP_HOURS_9357057 = -0.144359,
    SMOKING_9357064 = 0.002064,
    SOCIAL_WITHDRAW_9360084 = 0.093158,
    c_ssrs_compsite = 0.648556
)

# Which variables should behave as binary 0/1
binary_vars <- c(
    "c_ssrs_compsite",
    "NON_SUICIDAL_SELF_INJURY_9357062",
    "SMOKING_9357064",
    "SLEEP1_9357065",
    "SLEEP_9357058",
    "DAILY_NEGATIVE_STRESSFUL_EVENT_9357029",
    "DAILY_NEGATIVE_STRESSFUL_EVENT_9359029",
    "DAILY_NEGATIVE_STRESSFUL_EVENT_9360029",
    "ALCOHOL_9357063",
    "NEGATIVE_RELATIONSHIP_EVENTS_9360081"
)

# -------------------------------
# UI
# -------------------------------
ui <- fluidPage(
    titlePanel("Next-Day SI Prediction (Consensus GLMM-LASSO)"),
    
    sidebarLayout(
        sidebarPanel(
            checkboxInput("use_medians_all", "Use median values for ALL predictors", FALSE),
            uiOutput("sliders"),
            hr(),
            actionButton("compute", "Compute Prediction"),
            width = 4
        ),
        
        mainPanel(
            h3("Model Output"),
            verbatimTextOutput("eta_out"),
            verbatimTextOutput("prob_out")
        )
    )
)

# -------------------------------
# SERVER
# -------------------------------
server <- function(input, output, session) {
    
    # Default medians (all zeros by default)
    medians <- rep(0, length(beta) - 1)
    names(medians) <- names(beta)[-1]
    
    # Build dynamic UI
    output$sliders <- renderUI({
        if (input$use_medians_all) return(NULL)
        
        lapply(names(beta)[-1], function(var) {
            fluidRow(
                column(8,
                       if (var %in% binary_vars) {
                           numericInput(var, var, min = 0, max = 1, value = 0)
                       } else if (grepl("SLEEP_HOURS", var)) {
                           numericInput(var, var, min = 0, max = 12, value = 6)
                       } else {
                           sliderInput(var, var, min = 0, max = 6, value = 3)
                       }
                ),
                column(4,
                       checkboxInput(paste0(var, "_median"), "median", FALSE)
                )
            )
        })
    })
    
    # Compute prediction
    observeEvent(input$compute, {
        
        x <- numeric(length(beta))
        names(x) <- names(beta)
        x["(Intercept)"] <- 1
        
        for (var in names(beta)[-1]) {
            if (input$use_medians_all || isTRUE(input[[paste0(var, "_median")]])) {
                x[var] <- medians[var]
            } else {
                x[var] <- input[[var]]
            }
        }
        
        eta <- sum(x * beta)
        p <- plogis(eta)
        
        output$eta_out <- renderText({
            paste("Linear predictor (eta):", round(eta, 4))
        })
        output$prob_out <- renderText({
            paste("Predicted probability of SI:", round(p, 4))
        })
    })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
